Exhibition Room

Ferns

The quiet architecture of the fern frond — coiling fiddleheads, layered fronds, and the shifting light of the woodland floor rendered in a vivid, unexpected palette.

Ferns and Bellflowers
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
